zh.title: Solana/美元技术分析：短线震荡偏弱，关注均线支撑
zh.content:
SOL/USD现报85.22，24小时小幅回落，整体维持窄幅整理。价格运行在日内区间84.69至86.03之间，多空力量暂时均衡，但反弹力度有限，短线走势偏弱震荡。

从技术结构观察，20日均线位于84.75附近，当前价格略高于均线，说明市场仍存在一定支撑。MACD维持负值，显示动能尚未完全转强，若后续柱体继续缩短，则有望形成短线修复走势。

关键支撑位首先关注84.70区域，若跌破，可能进一步测试83.80附近低点；上方阻力集中在86.00至86.50区间，只有有效突破，才可能打开新的反弹空间，推动价格挑战88美元整数关口。

交易策略方面，激进交易者可依托84.70附近轻仓尝试短多，并严格设置止损；稳健投资者则建议等待MACD转强或放量突破86美元后再跟进，以降低震荡行情中的回撤风险。

en.title: Solana vs US Dollar Technical Analysis
en.content:
Solana against the US Dollar is currently in a short-term consolidation phase following a mild decline of 0.22% over the last 24 hours. Price action remains compressed between the intraday high of 86.03 and low of 84.69, suggesting equilibrium between buyers and sellers. The broader structure leans slightly neutral-to-bearish as momentum has softened after recent upside attempts, with traders now watching whether support can stabilize price above key moving averages.

Momentum indicators reflect a cautious bias. MACD at -0.0536 indicates weakening bullish momentum and a potential continuation of sideways to mildly bearish conditions, especially if histogram pressure persists below zero. The absence of RSI data limits overbought/oversold confirmation, but price holding near the 20-day SMA at 84.75 suggests buyers are defending the short-term trend baseline. Overall indicator alignment points to indecision with slight bearish tilt.

Immediate support is anchored at the 20-day SMA around 84.75, closely aligned with the recent swing low at 84.69, forming a tight demand zone. A break below this region could expose deeper retracement levels near 83.50. On the upside, resistance is seen at 86.03, with a breakout potentially opening the path toward 87.50–88.00, where prior supply zones may re-emerge.

Short-term traders may favor range-bound strategies, buying near the 84.70–84.80 support cluster and taking partial profits into the 86.00 resistance area. Risk management is crucial, with stops placed below 84.50 to avoid breakdown exposure. A confirmed breakout above 86.03 with volume expansion could justify momentum entries targeting higher resistance zones, while failure to reclaim upside momentum favors continued mean-reversion trading within the established range.
